name: Warship
short_description: This game takes players on an adventure soaring through a stormy sky.
detailed_description:
This game takes players on adventures in stormy skies. Using a mouse, players can control a brave seagull to navigate on rough seas. The visual effect is characterized by a delicate watercolor style, depicting constantly changing weather and ocean landscapes.
Players must avoid occasional rocks to avoid losing one of their three lives. Each game starts with three lives, and if all lives lose, the game ends. Let's test your limits!
